title: [codereview-P4] t_deck I2C comment could reference exact register map from TCA8418 datasheet
description: After vo1y edit, the I2C keyboard comment mentions reg 0x03 but does not link to full TCA8418 register map or driver polling contract. Add cross-ref to driver or datasheet appendix for completeness (P4 readability). Discovered from project-LICHEN-vo1y.
close_reason: Comment updated with register map cross-ref to driver
